bio.name: Amanuel Demirew
bio.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer & AI Developer
bio.description1: I'm a Full-Stack Software Engineer and AI Developer with 4+ years of experience building AI-powered applications, automation systems, and scalable backend architectures that drive measurable business value.
bio.description2: Based in Addis Ababa, Ethiopia, I specialize in creating intelligent software solutions that leverage cutting-edge AI technologies including LangChain, LlamaIndex, and multi-agent systems. I architect solutions that balance innovation with production-grade reliability.
bio.description3: My passion lies in bridging the gap between complex AI capabilities and practical, user-friendly applications that solve real-world problems—turning advanced AI concepts into deployable, scalable systems.
